contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 180
- Description: Sophia identity/auth (Telegram<->ledger, /verify, Column X policy) + vault 500 hotfix & deploy
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/221
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/224
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/225
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/226
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/522
  
  Details:
  Paired engineering session on truesight_autopilot (Sophia) — identity/auth + vault reliability:
  
  - Telegram identity binding: write Telegram ID to Column X and Telegram Handle to Column H of "Contributors contact information" (previously wrote the numeric ID into H and dropped the handle). PR #221.
  - Wired the Telegram /verify email-challenge flow into the adapter as a DM-only on-ramp, and made policy.resolve_identity resolve governors via Column X -> Governors cache (with caching + graceful degradation). PR #224.
  - Live 500 hotfix on /vault/api/system-status (phantom track_registry import) — PR #225 — then repointed the vault status/deploy endpoints at the canonical deploy_watcher registry so tracks show real data. PR #226.
  - Supporting documentation updates in agentic_ai_context. PR #522.
  - Merged all PRs, deployed to the sophia EC2 box (reset to origin/main + service restarts), and verified live: brain /health 200 and /vault/api/system-status 200.
  
  PRs:
  https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/221
  https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/224
  https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/225
  https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/226
  https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/522
